decisions.decision: Gemini 2.5 Flash replaces OpenAI for both vision and audio
Mood board: 1fps frames (cap 60), 5-col grid, single composed JPEG sent to Gemini
Locale format en-US (dash) not en_US (underscore) — BrainSuite API requirement
decisions.rationale: BS API expects BCP 47 dash format
